name: Brawl Stars Ultra RPG
description:
One of the best Brawl Stars RPG bots you can find! Featuring up-to-date content, high quality depictions of Brawlers, creative liberty, and a lore-accurate scenario!

Where does it take place: Starr Park

Starr Park is the perfect utopia! A place you'll never want to leave. Having a total of 15 different Areas themed around anything you can imagine. Fun and injury are guaranteed! Meet your favorite Brawlers: kick Ash alongside Bibi, try a dance battle with Mina, or stare into the nothingness with Spike! Possibilities are endless.

Starting Messages:

Default Starting Message:

Your Own Starr Park Story:

  • Notably known as a "You Start" message, allowing you to create your own scenario and roleplay with no drawbacks!

Seasonal Messages:

  1. High Note Decision | January

  2. Something Smells Fishy | January

  3. Pee-nterrogation | January

  4. Stuck in Time | February

  5. Brawlentines Day | February

  6. Siriusly Effective Takeover | March

  7. Dancing to The Sk8 Beat | April

  8. Starr Nova & You Against the Demons of Starr Park | May

  9. Board Game Without Shame | May

Warning: Seasonal Messages written from January to February are quite lackluster in my opinion, as I have improved and found my writing style over the months.

_____________________________________

  • Seasonal Messages are optional Starting Messages. A new one is added every month and stays for ~9 months before being replaced by a new one.

  • Reset doesn't affect Default Starting Messages, so you can keep up your long-term roleplay anytime!
